  "findings": [
    "Shims missing under column base plate during erection",
    "Lack of proper bearing and leveling support prior to grouting",
    "Potential instability of the erected column under load"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt further erection or loading on the affected column",
    "Install engineered steel shims or leveling nuts to establish proper elevation and plumb",
    "Verify column alignment and plumbness in accordance with AISC tolerances before proceeding"
  ],
  "rationale": "Erecting structural columns without proper shims or leveling devices under the base plate violates AISC 303 and OSHA Subpart R. It prevents proper plumbing, creates uneven load distribution, and compromises structural stability before the grout is poured.",

    "AISC 303 Section 7.5.1",
    "OSHA 1926.755"
  ]
